15 And he said unto the people, Be ready against the third day: come not at your wives.

16 And it came to pass on the third day in the morning, that there were thunders and lightnings, and a thick cloud upon the mount, and the voice of the []{#c2AR.xhtml_page_433}trumpet exceeding loud; so that all the people that was in the camp trembled.

17 And Moses brought forth the people out of the camp to meet with God; and they stood at the nether part of the mount.

18 And mount Sinai was altogether on a smoke, because the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}descended upon it in fire: and the smoke thereof ascended as the smoke of a furnace, and the whole mount quaked greatly.

19 And when the voice of the trumpet sounded long, and waxed louder and louder, Moses spake, and God answered him by a voice.

20 And the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}came down upon mount Sinai, on the top of the mount: and the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}called Moses up to the top of the mount; and Moses went up.

21 And the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}said unto Moses, Go down, charge the people, lest they break through unto the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}to gaze, and many of them perish.

22 And let the priests also, which come near to the [Lord]{.class_s4N8-0}, sanctify themselves, lest the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}break forth upon them.

23 And Moses said unto the [Lord]{.class_s4N8-0}, The people cannot come up to mount Sinai: for thou chargedst us, saying, Set bounds about the mount, and sanctify it.

24 And the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}said unto him, Away, get thee down, and thou shalt come up, thou, and Aaron with thee: but let not the priests and the people break through to come up unto the [Lord]{.class_s4N8-0}, lest he break forth upon them.

25 So Moses went down unto the people, and spake unto them."

We have commented on verse 14 in the remarks above.

["Come not at your wives"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 15). This verse is [mistranslated,]{.class_s4N4-0} according to Clarke, and should have been "come not near unto the FIRE." Clarke's prudery is a little too manifest here, as the regulation is perfectly understandable in view of Leviticus 15:16--18; 1 Samuel 21:4--5; and 1 Corinthians 7:5.

["There were thunders and lightnings, and a thick cloud upon the mount, and the voice of the trumpet exceeding loud"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 16). Not only are the people trembling (vs. 16), but Moses is trembling (Heb. 12:21). The whole picture typifies the post-Tribulation rapture of Revelation 11:12, and it also pictures the Rapture of the Christian in 1 Thessalonians 4:13--18. The [cloud ]{.class_s4N4-0}is present (Acts 1:9; Matt. 17:1--5); the [trumpet ]{.class_s4N4-0}is present (1 Cor. 15:51--52; Rev. 4:1--2); someone is being called ["up hither" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(see the [Commentary on Revelation]{.class_s4N4-0}, Rev. 11:12); and the [earthquake ]{.class_s4N4-0}of Revelation 11:13 is shaking things. The whole scene glows with signs of the Second Advent (cf. Ezek. 1:4--6; Zeph. 1:15--16).

At 6 o'clock in the morning, there is a clap of thunder, and the ground begins to tremble. The whole camp rises as one man, and those who have been up since 5 a.m. are just as startled as anyone else, for until 6 a.m., the sky has been as clear as plate glass. One huge cloud that formerly moved ahead of the camp now perches itself on top of Jebel Musa, and with the second crash of lightning and thunder, the sound of a trumpet is heard braying out over the camp with a volume that causes people to clap their hands over their ears. The whole camp streams down the "rocky" streets between the tents and assembles at the base of the mount. All eyes are upward. There is []{#c2AR.xhtml_page_435}an explosion like a 255mm shell going off, and the whole top of the mountain bursts into flame like a volcano. A column of smoke pours upward like someone had kindled a pile of pine needles as big as the Great Pyramid, and for fifteen minutes there is no danger of anyone "breaking out of bounds." The cattle are stampeding away from the mount, and there isn't a dog within 500 yards of the markers. When the fire and smoke have settled down considerably, the trumpet blast grows louder (vs. 19). Now many of the people are stuffing cotton in their ears, and some of them are shaking their heads like they were possessed. At this juncture, Moses is called up and given one more warning to pass on to the people (vss. 20--22).

["And let the priests also\...sanctify themselves, lest the ]{.class_s4N2-0}[Lord ]{.class_s4N9-0}[break forth upon them\...let not the priests and the people break through to come up unto the ]{.class_s4N2-0}[Lord]{.class_s4N9-0}["]{.class_s4N2-0} (vss. 22, 24). The reader will observe that the ["priests" ]{.class_s4N2-0}under [grace ]{.class_s4N4-0}have no privileges that any Israelite does not have, and since no tribe of Levi has yet been chosen to serve as ["priests,"]{.class_s4N2-0} the priests here are merely the firstborn of the family (13:12). Jethro and Melchizedek are "priests" long before the tribe of Levi is separated (Num. 8:14). (The modern "Catholic" Priest has no more spiritual authority than any saved teenager in Sandpit, Oklahoma. [All ]{.class_s4N4-0}Christians are "anointed" \[1 John 2:27\]; [all ]{.class_s4N4-0}offer the same sacrifices \[1 Pet. 2:5, 9\] which are not literal \[Heb. 13:15--16\]; and [none of them]{.class_s4N4-0} wear Halloween costumes \[Mark 12:38\].)

["And thou shalt come up, thou, and Aaron with thee"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 24). I know of no illustrated Bible story book that pictures Aaron receiving the Ten Commandments with Moses, but the text states that Aaron went up to hear 20:1--17, while the tablets of 31:18 were given []{#c2AR.xhtml_page_436}when Joshua accompanied Moses (see 24:12--13 and comments). Aaron (a type of Christ as High Priest) and Joshua (a type of Christ at His Second Advent) are the favored individuals who share the ministry of Moses (a type of Christ as Prophet) in his dealings with Israel.

[]{#c2DW.xhtml}

# [Chapter 20]{.class_s4NN} {.heading_s2E2-1}

20:1 "And God spake all these words, saying,

2 I am the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}thy God, which have brought thee out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.

3 Thou shalt have no other gods before me.

4 Thou shalt not make unto thee any graven image, or any likeness of any thing that is in heaven above, or that is in the earth beneath, or that is in the water under the earth:

5 Thou shalt not bow down thyself to them, nor serve them: for I the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}thy God am a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children unto the third and fourth generation of them that hate me;

6 And shewing mercy unto thousands of them that love me, and keep my commandments.

7 Thou shalt not take the name of the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}thy God in vain; for the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}will not hold him guiltless that taketh his name in vain.

8 Remember the sabbath day, to keep it holy.

9 Six days shalt thou labour, and do all thy work.

10 But the seventh day is the sabbath of the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}thy God: in it thou shalt not do any work, thou, nor thy son, nor thy daughter, thy manservant, nor thy maidservant, nor thy cattle, nor thy stranger that is within thy gates:

11 For in six days the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that in them is, and rested the seventh day: wherefore the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}blessed the sabbath day, and hallowed it.

12 Honour thy father and thy mother: that thy days may be long upon the land which the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}thy God giveth thee.

13 Thou shalt not kill.

14 Thou shalt not commit adultery.

15 Thou shalt not steal.

16 Thou shalt not bear false witness against thy neighbour.

17 Thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's house, thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's wife, nor his manservant, nor his maidservant, nor his ox, nor his ass, nor any thing that is thy neighbour's."

We will not spend a great deal of time commenting on the passage, for the Lord knows that it has received enough comment to fill the Library of Congress. Perhaps the most genuine and reliable thing ever said about the passage was said by an unsaved society woman in 1870, after leaving a service where the minister had delivered a blistering forty minute sermon on "the Ten Commandments." As she left the sanctuary, she muttered under her breath to a female companion: ["Well, at least I haven't made any graven images!"]{.class_s4N4-0}

To begin with, we should observe some great and universal truths about the famous "Ten."

1\. Only one human being who ever crossed the face of this earth was able to keep the first one (cf. Matt. 22:37).

2\. Buddha, Mohammed, Lao-tzu, Mao Tse-tung, Pope Leo I, Richard Nixon, Pope Gregory I, Abraham Lincoln, Ted Kennedy, Zoroaster, Confucius, Pope Paul VI, and Pope John XXIII violated ALL TEN OF THEM [regularly ]{.class_s4N4-0}(see James 2:10).

3\. The "Seventh-day Adventists" break all ten of them [regularly ]{.class_s4N4-0}(James 2:10), for the seventh day here in America is not the seventh day in Palestine: it never has been and never will be. The instructions for the day of rest were never given to any Israelite outside of an area 100 miles east or west of Jerusalem.

4\. The Law was a ["schoolmaster"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Gal. 3:24) to show a man his need for a righteousness greater than the man who was ["blameless" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(Luke 1:6) in the Law (Phil. 3:4--8).

5\. Where the pupil fails to allow the[ "schoolmaster"]{.class_s4N2-0} to lead him to Christ (Gal. 3:24), he goes back (Gal. 5:4) under ["the CURSE of the law"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Gal. 3:13).

6\. ["By the law is the knowledge of sin"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Rom. 3:20), not the knowledge of God; God will justify no man by the Law (Gal. 3:11), even though, [theoretically]{.class_s4N4-0}, IF a man could keep it, he would be justified (Rom. 2:13).

7\. The Law is holy, spiritual, and good (Rom. 7:12), but the sinner is unable to keep it (Rom. 8:3), and the sinner who is a big enough fool to think that he does keep it is self-deceived. No man keeps "the Ten" unless he keeps them written on a card in his billfold or engraved on a chain hanging around his neck. Christ says, "NONE OF YOU KEEP THE LAW" (John 7: 19); and if the best religious leaders of Orthodox Judaism didn't keep it, don't kid yourself---[you never have.]{.class_s4N4-0}

The Seventh-day Adventists (see the [Commentary on Genesis,]{.class_s4N4-0} Gen. 2:1--3) violate the fourth commandment regularly. They travel more than ["a sabbath's days journey"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Acts 1:12); they go right on "gathering sticks" (Num. 15:32) and "kindling fires" (Exod. 35:3), and their "Sabbath" is more than six hours off the correct Sabbath, making them go on over into Saturday, []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_440}where they professed to stop. Mary Ellen White (Herald and Review Publishing Co., and Pacific and Southern Publishing Companies), like any self-righteous, deluded Pharisee, only fancied that she "kept the Sabbath," and the poison---beautifully illustrated!---which has spewed forth from her followers since 1920 has caused enough people to stumble into Hell to give Judge Rutherford competition.

Seventh-day Adventists---as Mormons and Jehovah's Witnesses---are noted for their cowardly hypocrisy in professing their faith: none of these groups will ever be caught telling anyone what they really are. They are always "Watchtower students," "The Hour of Prophecy," "The Bible Student's Association," "Reformed Church of Latter Day Saints," or some other depraved, lying invention designed to seduce the[ "unlearned and unstable"]{.class_s4N2-0} (2 Pet. 3:16 cf. Eph. 4:14). Those of us who are theologically HONEST never have to invent misleading terms to describe our religious beliefs. I, for example, am a [Bible-believing Christian. ]{.class_s4N4-0}I am proud of my connection with a group of people who have stood---from the beginning---for separation of Church and State, the eternal security of the believer, no water baptism until [after ]{.class_s4N4-0}regeneration, and the absolute infallibility of the Bible in all matters of faith and practice. The world calls us [BAPTISTS]{.class_s4N4-0}. If that is what they wish to call me, it is perfectly all right with me, as long as they make it clear that I am a [BIBLE-BELIEVING ]{.class_s4N4-0}Baptist. We believe a Christian should nail his colors to the mast and display them publicly and may God have mercy upon any money-grabbing socialite who has to hide his real beliefs behind such apocryphal terms as [Christian]{.class_s4N4-0} when he meant Russellite, or "Bible Students of Prophecy" when []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_441}he meant "Seventh-day Adventist." Does a Modernist do any worse? What is the difference in APPROACH?

The First Commandment has two variations: one will be found in Deuteronomy 5:7 and the other in Deuteronomy 6:4--5. The variations cause men like Dummelow (Commentary, pg. 66) to assume that some other writer (P? J? R? XYZ? AWOL?) wrote Deuteronomy and that Exodus is a "purer" copy of the original. Observe the same phenomenon in the "Sermon on the Mount" as recorded in Matthew 5:1 and Luke 11:1. The intelligent student of Scripture (who has better sense than to take Conservatives like Dummelow seriously) will observe that the two "Sermons on the Mount" (Matt. 5:1; Luke 6:17, 20) are [two different occasions]{.class_s4N4-0}; that is plainly the case in dealing with Exodus chapter 20 and Deuteronomy chapters 5--6. Any variations are due to verbal speech, and no contradictions are present. There is difference in "description" but not in essence of truth; note the same phenomenon in the resurrection accounts and the "inscriptions on the cross" (Matt. 27--28, Mark 15--16, Luke 23--24, John 19--20).

["And God spake all these words"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 1). Although the context of the message is plainly to Israel (vss. 2--3), the insertion of the word ["God"]{.class_s4N2-0} for "LORD" shows that [nine ]{.class_s4N4-0}of the ten commandments stretch beyond the immediate context. The only [ceremonial commandment]{.class_s4N4-0} in the ten (which is said to be ["a SIGN" ]{.class_s4N2-0}to Israel) is the one pilfered by Mary Ellen White---the fourth commandment. Every one of the remaining nine are [moral commandments]{.class_s4N4-0} which bear a universal stamp. The fourth commandment is said to be a SIGN between the LORD God of Israel and Israel (Ezek. 20:12, 20) since []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_442 .class-1}["the Jews require a sign"]{.class_s4N2-0} (1 Cor. 1:22), but the other nine are more far reaching than[ "a sign"]{.class_s4N2-0} to Israel.

These commandments are called ["the testimony"]{.class_s4N2-0} (25:16) and ["the covenant"]{.class_s4N2-0} (34:28); they fall into two divisions (Matt. 22:37--40) according to Bullinger and Williams. However, one of the four commandments that deals with man's relation to God is a CEREMONIAL commandment; the remaining six deal with duties to mankind.

The first outstanding Roman Catholic to encourage idolatry was the North African evolutionist, Aurelius Augustine (A.D. 354--430). To guarantee a place in the church for the statues of Mary, Joseph, Isis, Osiris, Christopher, Xavier, and the "Virgin of Guadeloupe," Augustine [omitted the second commandment,]{.class_s4N4-0} and then, sensing that he was left with a total of only NINE, [he split verse 17 into two commandments. ]{.class_s4N4-0}(This is what is known as "wrongly dividing the word of truth." See 2 Pet. 3:16.)

If you would like to do some interesting research, go around America and check the stone monuments which bear a plate recording the Ten Commandments; most of them have copied the North African heresy of the Roman Church. (Observe the same thing in the corrupt [ASV ]{.class_s4N4-0}and [NASV,]{.class_s4N4-0} recommended by R.A. Torrey and John R. Rice, where ["on earth peace, good will toward men"]{.class_s4N2-0} has been altered to "peace on earth to MEN OF GOOD WILL." This latter reading, found in the[ NASV]{.class_s4N4-0} and the [NRSV,]{.class_s4N4-0} comes from the Roman [Vulgate ]{.class_s4N4-0}of Jerome.)

It would be unthinkable to suppose that 20:4 is not a commandment given to Israel. As a matter of fact, one must erase verse 5 to erase verse 4, and if there is one outstanding truth about Judaism (in orthodox or liberal form), it is that idols and statues are absolutely []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_443}forbidden. No Jew from A.D. 70 to A.D. 2010 could be found with a statue or an idol. They were found in times of apostasy [before ]{.class_s4N4-0}Christ (Judg. 1--10; Jer. 10--40), but when ["]{.class_s4NC}[the image of God" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(2 Cor. 4:4; Heb. 1:2--3) showed up (!), they abandoned every image they had and have never been caught with one since. Even apostate Judaism will rebel (Rev. 13:1--3) when the Antichrist (Rev. 13:13--18) sets up the image (Dan. 3:1--18).

The private interpretation of the Roman Catholic Church here (Popes, councils, encyclicals, decrees, dogma, Bishops, Priests, Nuns, and Cardinals included) is not only a travesty of common sense and good judgment, but it is a blasphemous insult to the Holy Spirit and the Lord Jesus Christ---["who is the image of the invisible God"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Col. 1:15). (When we Christians talk in this fashion, we never have to sue anyone, take anyone to court, arrest anyone, threaten anyone, or coerce anyone to back up our convictions. People who do those kinds of things hate deeply and strongly, and they only imagine that everyone who uses rough terminology is as rotten as they are. What Communists, Socialists, and Catholics call "[hate ]{.class_s4N4-0}literature" is only the response of reprobates to the truth. ["By their fruits ye shall know them" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(Matt. 7:20). Billy Sunday \[1862--1935\] and Sam Jones \[1847--1906\] never had to arrest, sue, slander, blackmail, frame, or coerce anyone to enforce their convictions. Truthful convictions need no reinforcement but a [clear stating]{.class_s4N4-0} of the conviction.)

THE FIRST COMMANDMENT

["I am the ]{.class_s4N2-0}[Lord ]{.class_s4N9-0}[thy God\...thou shalt have no other gods before me"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vss. 2--3).

The correct reading is the [King James]{.class_s4N4-0} reading, and the reader may ignore the change from ["before me"]{.class_s4N2-0} to ["beside me" ]{.class_s4N4-0}found in some of the commentaries. The first commandment is NEGATIVE: ["Thou shalt have no other gods before me."]{.class_s4N2-0} This matches Genesis 2:17, which see. (As a famous skeptic once said: "I would approve of all the Ten Commandments if one would simply take the word ["not"]{.class_s4N2-0} out of the third, sixth, seventh, eighth, ninth, and tenth commandments.")

["No other gods"]{.class_s4N2-0} means ["'no other gods']{.class_s4N2-0}---GOOD OR BAD." That is, if one makes a god out of the Second Commandment found in Matthew 22:39 (as Stalin, McGill, Lincoln, Roosevelt, Engels, Lenin, Castro, Mao Tse, Trotsky, Schweitzer, Gandhi, Astruc, Renan, Emerson, FDR, Ted Kennedy, or any international Socialist did), he has broken all TEN COMMANDMENTS (James 2:10). You are not to put anything or anybody BEFORE God (Col. 1:18), and running to the Hebrew to prove that ["before" ]{.class_s4N2-0}meant only "before my face" only shows that you are trying to run your idol in ahead of the First Commandment (Matt. 22:37). When you make a god out of science, philosophy, or education (as Augustine, Origen, Warfield, Robertson, Einstein, Bergson, Darwin, Huxley, Haeckel, or any unregenerated Ph.D. in any age, on any continent, did), you have put something ahead of God and in place of God, and you are an [idolater]{.class_s4N4-0} (see Col. 3:5 and comments in the[ Commentary on Galatians--Colossians]{.class_s4N4-0}).

The idolaters in any age from 3000 B.C. to A.D. 2010 can always be spotted---at least where they attempt to teach philosophy, social science, religion, government, politics, or ethics. Every writer from [The Book of the Dead]{.class_s4N4-0} to [The Naked Ape]{.class_s4N4-0} concludes his thesis with a []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_445}reference to a [neuter object. ]{.class_s4N4-0}This rule is infallible. All you have to do is turn to the [last page ]{.class_s4N4-0}of any book that Einstein, Wells, Huxley, Pavlov, Schopenhauer, Leibnitz, Spinoza, Marx, Mao, Plato, Hegel, Aristotle, Dewey, Russell, Mailer, Kuenen, Freud, or Kant ever wrote; and you will find that they believed the final solution for mankind lay in some "THING" (see 1 Sam. 4:3). Tillich ([Time ]{.class_s4N4-0}magazine) expresses it most succinctly when he deifies the neuter "IT" where all can see "it." This great neuter "deity" of paganism will be found in the writings [of every educator, idealist, romantic novelist, and ethical philosopher from 1700 to 2010.]{.class_s4N4-0}

To save time and space, we shall simply list the various neuter ["gods" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(Psa. 82, Jer. 10:11), and the reader may test the thesis for himself. We have overstated nothing. All Eastern or Western systems of education lead to a NEUTER DEITY, in spite of the plain revelation of God (Deut. 30:20) that ["he shall save his people from their sins"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Matt. 1:21).

1\. Intellectual honesty.

2\. Goodness.

3\. Good will or good [intentions]{.class_s4N4-0}.

4\. Helping your fellow man.

5\. Grasping the nature of the universe.

6\. Attaining "oneness with the infinite reality or presence."

7\. Reaching maturity through spiritual perception.

8\. [Adjusting ]{.class_s4N4-0}to changes in society.

9\. Peace on earth to men of good will.

10\. Making the world a better place in which to live.

11\. Realizing the "divine" in the spirit of man.

12\. Seeing god in your fellow creatures.

13\. Expanding knowledge to grasp "the truth."

14\. Expressing oneself freely.

15\. Adjusting ethics and conduct to the situation.

16\. Enabling others to appreciate goodness and truth.

17\. Learning to live harmoniously with your "fellow man."

18\. Working together for the "good" of all.

There, that drains the barrel.

These are the "gods of Moab" (Deut. 23:3 cf. Ruth 1:15), which are called "PEACE AND PROSPERITY" in Deuteronomy 23:6. No man has ever gone beyond these idols without the New Birth described in the New Testament, and the greatest brains that ever functioned---with IQs of 150--170---could never go beyond this simple idolatrous paganism of [deifying neuters. ]{.class_s4N4-0}Every speech made by [every ]{.class_s4N4-0}President of the United States, from Washington to Nixon (and from Ford to Obama), closed with the recommendation of a THING instead of a PERSON. When the "person" finally is recognized by the world (John 5:43), he will be the [wrong person]{.class_s4N4-0} (Zech. 11:16--17). At that time, he will be deified by every educator, scientist, philosopher, and ecumenical leader (Rev. 13:3--18) on the face of the earth; and this man will thoroughly damn (Rev. 14:9--10) the Supreme Court judges and astronauts right along with the junkies, pimps, and prostitutes.

Anything or anybody placed ahead of God leads to destruction. ["Thou shalt have no other gods before me"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 3). The educated sinner of any race, class, sex, age, color, or station in life, in any period of history, will be forced to one conclusion if he sees this revelation that God has given to man.

"I cannot love and worship [something ]{.class_s4N4-0}I cannot see. I must have some THING I can see and touch---or at []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_447}least "feel." Therefore, there is something either radically wrong with me, or else there is something radically wrong with that blasted BIBLE!"

Every educated man who ever lived came to that conclusion.

The first commandment "oversimplifies" man's problem to the point where man has no problem but that [one commandment. ]{.class_s4N4-0}If you could keep that [one, ]{.class_s4N4-0}you could keep the others without even praying about them.

THE SECOND COMMANDMENT

["Thou shalt not make unto thee any graven image" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(vs. 4)

The first commandment covers every form of idolatry, and the second commandment covers a specific type of idolatry which showed up after the flood (Acts 14:13--15, 17:29). Deuteronomy is a fine comment on the text. Although "likenesses" are commanded by God in the construction of the Tabernacle and Temple (Exod. 25:19; 1 Kings 6:32)---and Roman Catholics beat the drum for all its worth on those verses (!)---the instructions of chapter 20 are clear:

1\. You are not to ["make unto thee"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 4) any image.

2\. ["Unto thee"]{.class_s4N2-0} means to ["bow down thyself to them" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(vs. 5).

3\. Where this is done, payment for sin extends to grandchildren, great-grandchildren, and further (vs. 5).

Observe how most of the commentators failed to exposit verse 5 correctly because they were anxious not to apply it to their Roman Catholic "friends." Bullinger, Williams, Ellicott, Lange, et al. all refused to apply the []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_448}commandment, as the application is painfully obvious; it accounts for the conditions that exist today in South Ireland, Italy, Spain, and South America.

An image lover is a God hater: ["of them that hate me" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(vs. 5).

The sin mentioned above is the sin outlined in Romans chapter 1, which began when "professors" (Rom. 1:22) refused to "glorify God" (Rom. 1:21). The theory of evolution (Rom. 1:23) is the result of this sin. The iniquity is not only visited upon the third and fourth generation, but it extends to the tenth generation [nationally. ]{.class_s4N4-0}The reader of history will note that Darwin's idolatry still affects the public school system ("Federal" school system, to tell the truth) in America; and ["the iniquity of the fathers"]{.class_s4N2-0} still produces thousands of sex-crazy, drugged, passive perverts who were stupid enough to believe that[ "the image of God" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(Heb. 1:2--3) was like unto ["four-footed beasts,"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["creeping things"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Rom. 1:23).

If evolution is true, Jesus Christ came from an ape. (That is not "overstatement," and you only presume it to be so because you are too big a coward to speak clearly where people can identify you.) ["The "image of God"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Gen. 1:27) was originally a hairy [Sinanthropus ]{.class_s4N4-0}or [Pithecanthropus]{.class_s4N4-0}, according to the latest ravings of these demented idolaters. The born-again child of God has no more business believing these kind of fairy tales than the ones those deluded idiots dreamed up about [Proconsul]{.class_s4N4-0} and [Ramapithecus. ]{.class_s4N4-0}(If you don't have any evidence and can't make a living without putting on a show, [you make up some words!]{.class_s4N4-0})

As it has been said before, the two verses have been deleted from the Catholic "Ten Commandments," []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_449}although they are in every Hebrew manuscript that has ever been found; they are found also in the Samaritan Pentateuch, the Chaldean, Syriac, [Vulgate]{.class_s4N4-0}, Coptic, Arabic, and even in the corrupt [Septuagint]{.class_s4N4-0}. Clarke is quite correct, this time, in observing that the omission of the commandment from the Catholic "Ten" marks that church "with the deepest brand of ever-enduring infamy." The mark of Rome is IDOLS (Zech. 11:17), and its "shepherd" (Vicar---Zech. 11:16) has a MARK which marks him as the author of these Roman Catholic "moral standards" (Rev. 13:16--18).

Dr. Johnson ([Wycliffe Commentary]{.class_s4N4-0}) loses the connection entirely between the two expressions ["them that hate me"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["them that love me"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vss. 5--6). Dummelow and Bullinger also miss it, and throughout, the commentators help Rome out as much as possible. ["Them that love me"]{.class_s4N2-0} is the antithesis of ["them that HATE me,"]{.class_s4N2-0} and the context of both expressions is in regards to the use of GRAVEN IMAGES.

Now, how all of the major commentators (Origen to Archer) missed the BIBLICAL APPLICATION of the passage is baffling. For, you see, there WAS an Israelite who specialized in graven images; God DID visit his iniquity to the ["third and fourth generation."]{.class_s4N2-0} A whole tribe was visited with this iniquity, [and this tribe hired priests whom they called "fathers"!]{.class_s4N4-0} Furthermore, this tribe worshipped[ "the queen of heaven"]{.class_s4N2-0} and offered incense at an altar. They spread their religion to South Ireland, Italy, and Spain before Christ was born; and their worship used vestment and vestrymen for long-robed "fathers" who made prayers for dead people.

You say, "Where is all that?!" [Read your Bible. ]{.class_s4N4-0}And whatever you do, NEVER follow the example set by []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_450}Custer, Wuest, Thieme, Lange, Clarke, Bullinger, Neal, Weniger, Brown, Dummelow, Baxter, Fausset, Schaff, Keil, Delitzsch, and the [New Bible Commentary!]{.class_s4N4-0}

Clarke almost finds the truth (pg. 403) when he grasps the connection between "punishment by proxy" and idolatry, but then he drops ["them that love me"]{.class_s4N2-0} in verse 6.

[An image lover is a God hater. ]{.class_s4N4-0}(cf. Deut. 16:22, 24:16; Jer. 32:18; and Rev. 13 in connection with vss. 5--6).

Observe how neatly the ["of them"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 6) refers to the "generations" of verse 5 in the English text. Mercy extends to thousands of generations who abandon idols. This explains Malachi 3:6 and why the ["generation"]{.class_s4N2-0} of Matthew 24:34 is still alive today and waiting restoration (Rom. 11:25--32), for notice: ["that he might have mercy upon all"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Rom. 11:32).

The graven images of Greece, India, Rome, and Egypt are legendary and only to be exceeded by the graven images of Jerusalem (Isa. 10:10, 30:22) and the United States of America. In the Western Hemisphere, over 20,000,000 "Christians" bow down to graven images every month. (You see, you forgot the "Good-Neighbor policy" in Canada, South America, Central America, and the West Indies!) In the United States, nearly 4,000,000 people "bow down" to the statues of the "Via Dolorosa," and the graven images and molten images are found in every city in the United States with a population over 5,000. Many towns with a population of 2,000 have an image of Mary standing in her ["grove"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Deut. 16:21), in spite of the efforts of Conservative scholars to retranslate the word ["grove"]{.class_s4N2-0} as ["asherim"]{.class_s4N4-0} (see any corrupt translations such as the [ASV]{.class_s4N4-0} or [NASV]{.class_s4N4-0}).

An image lover is a God hater.

THE THIRD COMMANDMENT

"Thou shalt not take the name of the [Lord ]{.class_s4N8-0}thy[ God in vain"]{.class_s4N2-2}[ (vs. 7).]{.class_s4N3-1}

So far we have hit nothing but negatives. There is one positive reference (vs. 6) to people who love God and keep His commandments, but the ["commandments"]{.class_s4N2-0} so far are negative. ["Thou shalt not take the name"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 7).

Leviticus 24:10--12 describes what happened to a man who did take the name ["in vain." ]{.class_s4N2-0}If the Ten Commandments had been enforced on America like they were enforced on Israel, every street corner, tennis court, barroom, business office, lunch counter, bathroom, bus station, football stadium, garage, ball diamond, dance hall, restaurant, courtroom, jail, hospital, and traffic light would have a pile of stones by it (Lev. 24:14) big enough to build a ranch-style house. The ["mouth\...full of cursing and bitterness"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Rom. 3:14) is so common in America that it is accepted as normal conversation. The fireman damns the engineer, the pilot damns the control tower, the copilot damns the pilot, the catcher damns the batter, the batter damns the umpire, the tackle damns the guard, the policeman damns the traffic, the carpenter damns his tools, the waitress damns the customers, the customer damns the food, the Roman church damns the Bible (you read it right. See [Mark of the Beast]{.class_s4N4-0}), the Communist damns the economic system, the hippies damn the establishment, and many a "commuter" has damned his car with so many curses it is a miracle that God doesn't roll the vehicle over ten times before it hits the "Interstate."

Typewriters, telephones, and golf (and now computers) have increased the cursing vocabulary in []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_452}America to a great extent, and what was not developed and refined in the military is "wrought out" in the home, office, or on the golf links. When I board a DC-7 going to a meeting, I ask God to take the "damns" off the plane. I do not consider this to be a superstition but rather a reasonable "counter-request." What is wrong with asking God to bless something if between ten to one hundred people have asked God to DAMN it before I get on it? Is this unreasonable? How do you know that 90% of the car wrecks and plane crashes were not due to the fact that God took some sinner at his word? [CAN YOU PROVE THAT?]{.class_s4N4-0}

Now we realize, of course, that technically the words [damn, hell,]{.class_s4N4-0} etc., are not "taking the name of the Lord in vain." (Or as one child said, "My daddy uses the same words the preacher uses; he just uses them [differently!]{.class_s4N4-0}") Down South, an occasional [damn ]{.class_s4N4-0}or [hell ]{.class_s4N4-0}is considered quite proper as long as "no ladies are present," or you "know" the man to whom you are talking. However, many of these same people backslide into "Lord" and "Lordy" (and "good God") without pleading guilty to a violation of the commandment. In some circles, only the name of Jesus Christ Himself is considered to be referred to when "taking the name" in vain, but there is one group of "Christians" who constantly use the name of Jesus Christ as a cuss word and feel just as much at home with such expressions as "Che-e-erist this" and "Che-e-erist that" as "good morning" and "good evening." [Guess who?!]{.class_s4N4-0} Strangely enough, this same group of "Christians" (who feel at home using the name of Jesus Christ in vain) are the same folks who insist that verse 4 is not a commandment. Do you suppose this is accidental?

["For the ]{.class_s4N2-0}[Lord ]{.class_s4N9-0}[will not hold him guiltless" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(vs. 7). Many a Southerner has apologized for a "God damn" uttered before a preacher or a Christian layman, and has entirely overlooked the fact that the oath was uttered before GOD. If a man is not as careful of his language before God as he is before a sinner, something is wrong somewhere.

The interpretation of the passage which limits it only to false oaths (Lev. 6:5) is entirely incorrect, and this is apparent from Matthew 26:74 and James 5:12. "Taking the Lord's name in VAIN" is using the Lord's name for any [useless purpose]{.class_s4N4-0} at anytime; included in the warning (Matt. 5:34) are overtones not even to use such terms as [heaven ]{.class_s4N4-0}or [earth ]{.class_s4N4-0}disrespectfully. Thus, "Christian cussing" is real cursing, although it does not [appear ]{.class_s4N4-0}to be so. Such expressions as "heavenly days," "good heavens," "my stars," etc., plainly violate Matthew 5:34--37. Along the same line, we find "land o' Goshen," "land's sakes," "my lands," "my goodness," "my gracious," etc. (Your "goodness" and your "grace" is the [Lord Jesus Christ]{.class_s4N4-0} if we are to believe the Pauline Epistles. See Rom. 5:15; 1 Cor. 1:4; Eph. 2:7; 2 Tim. 1:9, Rom. 3:22; 1 Cor. 1:30; 2 Cor. 5:21.) Since the tongue is ["an unruly evil, full of deadly poison"]{.class_s4N2-0} (James 3:8), the Puritans were not as far off when it came to proper conversation as their great-grandchildren were.

Behind ["cotton pickin'"]{.class_s4N4-0} lies the word "DAMN" (Gen. 9:25). Behind ["I'll be John Browned"]{.class_s4N4-0} lies "I'll be damned," for ["cursed is every one that hangeth on a tree"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Gal. 3:13), and John Brown was hung. One does not have to cry "Od's bodkins!" or "Od's blut!" or "Holy Mary" or "Holy Mackerel" to prove their "Christianity." Behind "Od's bodkins" lies "God's body" ("Corpus []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_454}Christi," I believe, is the Latin American expression!), and behind "Od's blut" lies God's blood (Acts 20:28). Mary was no more "holy" than Peter, James, and John; and Peter, James, and John were no more holy than Martin Luther or St. Francis.

Lurking behind "Gee" and "Gee whiz" and "Jimminy" and "Jiminy Crickets" and "Jeepers Creepers" are two clear words: JESUS CHRIST. No one with any sense is fooled with "golly" or "gosh" or "gosh darn" or "goldurn" or "dad burn" or "sam hill." "God" and "damn" and "hell" are what the culprit is trying to say, but he is trying to curse respectably. The modern TV expression is simply "Gaa" This word comes out of the mouth of nearly every child actor on TV at least once a day. Why not "rats!" or "horsefeathers!"?

Why is it always "GEE WHILLIKERS!" Why not: ["By Darwin"]{.class_s4N4-0} or ["What the Bertrand Russell are you doing here?"]{.class_s4N4-0} How about ["Buddha damn this sewing machine"?]{.class_s4N4-0} Isn't it strange how the Bible states the problem before it shows up and then the people who reject the Bible go right ahead and prove the problem to be exactly as it was stated? \[See Phil. 2:9--10; Acts 4:12.\]

THE FOURTH COMMANDMENT

["Remember the sabbath day, to keep it holy"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 8).

We have commented on this already under 12:16, and there is a complete discussion under Genesis 2:1--2 in that Commentary.

Verse 11, in the context, is usually misinterpreted to mean that the Sabbath was instituted in Genesis 2:1--2. But Moses probably wrote Genesis 2:1--2 AFTER Exodus 12:16, and this Sabbath (Ezek. 20:12) is revealed on [Sinai ]{.class_s4N4-0}[]{#c2DW.xhtml_page_455 .class-1}(Neh. 9:14) many, many years after Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob were dead. Neither Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, Noah, Enoch, nor Abel ever kept the ["sabbath"]{.class_s4N2-0}; nor is there any reason for anyone to think that God said one word about it to any man, living or dead, until after 1600 B.C. ["The ]{.class_s4N2-0}[Lord ]{.class_s4N9-0}[blessed the sabbath day, and hallowed it"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 11) in Genesis 2:1--3, but He certainly did nothing about it from the standpoint of revealing it to man until the time of the Exodus.

The reason for this is crystal clear to a sixth grader with ordinary intelligence. Israel does not appear as a national and political entity until Exodus; therefore, the sign is given to them as a token of the covenant between them as a NATION and God as the creator of that nation. Adam's sign was a coat of skin; Noah's sign was a rainbow; Abraham's sign was circumcision; and Israel's sign, under the Law, was the Sabbath. (The student will notice that the first sabbath given under grace \[12:16\] was SUNDAY, the first day of the week. No regular Saturday sabbath is given to anyone as such until it is given to the nation of Israel after they assent to the terms of the covenant \[19:8\]. Exodus 16:20--29 was plainly a "test case" \[16:4, 28\] to see if the people would keep the Sabbath when it was instituted.) The greatest "Seventh-day Adventists" (Sabbatarians) were among the people who murdered Jesus Christ (Matt. 12:1--6, 10--12; Mark 3:2--4; John 5:9--10, 16, 18, 9:14, 16, 19:31).

The cattle get rest also on the seventh day, since God's care for the brute creation is manifest many times in the Old Testament (see Gen. 8:1, 9:9--11; Jon. 4:11; Exod. 23:5, 12; and Deut. 25:4. See also Prov. 12:10 and comments in the[ Commentary on Proverbs]{.class_s4N4-0}).

THE FIFTH COMMANDMENT

["Honour thy father and thy mother"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 12).

The commandment is [positive, ]{.class_s4N4-0}and hence it is referred to as ["the first commandment with promise"]{.class_s4N2-0} in Ephesians 6:2. Although a promise was found in 20:6 (which see), the promise here is definitely positive. Here is a specific reward: ["that thy days may be long upon the land"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 12). (See Prov. 9:9, 11:19 and comments in the [Commentary on Proverbs]{.class_s4N4-0}.) Psalm 34:12 and Deuteronomy 25:15 are corollaries with the verse.

The verse is self-explanatory, although the Orientals have a much better concept of it than Westerners. The "elder" and the "ancestor" are honored in all Oriental countries to a greater extent than in Europe and America. The young man guilty of Mark 7:11 deserves to die (Mark 7:10) according to the true meaning of the commandment, and capital punishment was the just dessert of those who refused parental discipline and chastening (Deut. 21:18). Again, it is fortunate in America that God did not bind it to a Mosaic covenant, for under such regulations, there wouldn't be a high school classroom in America with more than twenty children left alive in it.

THE SIXTH COMMANDMENT

["Thou shalt not kill"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 13).

The alteration of the text by the Alexandrian scribes in England ([RV]{.class_s4N4-0}, 1885) is entirely unnecessary as the [AV ]{.class_s4N4-0}(1611) has self-interpreted the word as[ "murder" ]{.class_s4N2-0}in Matthew 19:18. This is to safeguard the reader who is careless and fails to notice that everything from the fifth commandment onward is aimed at [individual conduct. ]{.class_s4N4-0}[]{#c2DW.xhtml_page_457 .class-1}There are no national, military aims discussed. The same God who said ["Thou shalt not kill,"]{.class_s4N2-0} said, ["utterly destroy"]{.class_s4N2-0} (1 Sam. 15:1--4); the man who obeyed the sixth commandment (Saul) lost the throne because of his "conscientious objecting."

However, the Conservative scholar Adam Clarke takes Saul's side in the matter and insists that [all wars]{.class_s4N4-0} are violations of this commandment---or at least any war fought in the last 2,000 years. Although he does not deny the rightness of capital punishment, Clarke's definitions are so broad (Commentary, pg. 405) that we would think we were dealing with a Communist Supreme Court judge like Earl Warren instead of a Bible believer. All the wars of Israel (Joshua---2 Kings) were for the purpose of "extending empire," exactly as the wars of Hitler; if such a war were "murder," then Joshua, Caleb, David, Ehud, Barak, and Jephthah (and the other heroes of faith in Heb. 11:32) were some of the biggest murderers who ever should have been executed. Clarke cannot grasp the distinction between [manslaughter ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Num. 35:22--25), [murder ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Num. 35:16--21), [self-defense]{.class_s4N4-0} (Luke 22:36), [capital punishment]{.class_s4N4-0} (Gen. 9:6), [government executions]{.class_s4N4-0} (Rom. 13:4), and [armed combat]{.class_s4N4-0} (Num. 31:3--7). If you have the same trouble, may we recommend the [AV ]{.class_s4N4-0}text of 1611 as a cure for this ignorance.

["Thou shalt not kill"]{.class_s4N2-0} is in no way connected with any war which America ever fought, or any war which England, France, Turkey, Germany, Spain, Russia, China, Japan, or India ever fought. Phinehas is rewarded by God for pinning a man and a woman to the ground with a spear (Num. 25:7--13); David is honored for slaughtering an Amalekite who did him a favor (2 Sam. []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_458}1--2); Jael is ["blessed above women"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Judg. 5:24)[ for assassinating a man while he was asleep.]{.class_s4N4-0}

Now these are the famous "objectionable passages" discovered by Celsus (A.D. 105--180), Porphyry (A.D. 232--303), Tom Paine (A.D. 1737--1809), Voltaire (A.D. 1694--1778), and their retinue. (They "teach the young people bad morals," and thus they make the Bible a bad book "filled with filthy and horrible practices of barbarian cruelty," etc.) In every case, the critic has refused to face the[ facts ]{.class_s4N4-0}of the text.

Phinehas stops a religion which called for the murder of BABIES to false gods (Jer. 7:31). David, in the position of Romans 13:3--4, executes the Scriptural requirement of 2 Samuel 1:13--16 on a man who should have been wiped out in 1 Samuel 15:7--9, 32--33. Jael gives aid to her own people in a military conflict where her people might have been slaughtered to the last man.

An order [to fire a gun at a spy]{.class_s4N4-0} is not a violation of the text.

An order to [defend a gun emplacement]{.class_s4N4-0} is not a violation of the text.

An order [to pull a lever by the bomb bay]{.class_s4N4-0} is not a violation of the text.

A gun fired at an [intruder ]{.class_s4N4-0}who has come to rape your wife is not a violation of the text.

A gun fired at a [hippie rioter]{.class_s4N4-0} who is charging you with razor blades, bottles, and bags full of urine is not a violation of the text.

A [thrown switch]{.class_s4N4-0} on an electric chair after a fair trial is not a violation of the text.

A finger on the trigger of a machine gun aimed at [charging infantry]{.class_s4N4-0} is not a violation of the text.

A Kureneko delivered to the eyes of a "civil rights worker" [who has attacked you with a knife]{.class_s4N4-0} is NOT a violation of the text.

And further! if any man differs with those opinions, you mark him down as a passive Socialist or a man who would use weapons against you to take what you have away from you. (Now mark that down and die by it!) The man who quotes Exodus 20:13 and Matthew 5:2--9 in the same breath will take your [church]{.class_s4N4-0}, your [school]{.class_s4N4-0}, your [property, ]{.class_s4N4-0}and your [children ]{.class_s4N4-0}from under your will and authority in less time than it takes to throw Richard Wurmbrand and the "Minute Men" in jail. And if you don't believe that, you WILL before 1980!

THE SEVENTH COMMANDMENT

["Thou shalt not commit adultery ]{.class_s4N2-0}(vs. 14).

The verse is self-explanatory, and the Bible makes so many remarks about the subject that a man who believes in "situation ethics" has to reject a volume of truth bigger than a telephone book. (We have commented on the matter at length under Prov. 4--8 in the [Commentary on Proverbs]{.class_s4N4-0}, and again under Matt. 19:1--12 in the [Commentary on Matthew]{.class_s4N4-0}.) Among other things, the Bible states the transgression deserves [capital punishment]{.class_s4N4-0} (Lev. 20:10); it can be committed in secret in [the heart]{.class_s4N4-0} (Job 24:15; Matt. 5:28); it is responsible for illegitimate children (Isa. 57:3); it is abhorred of God (Ezek. 23; Mal. 2); it merits death by stoning (John 8:4); and the commandments against it are repeated under grace (Rom. 13:9) as well as the Law (Hos. 4:13). The crime is characteristic of a nation that God has abandoned. David commits physical adultery; Solomon commits spiritual adultery; Rome is an adulteress []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_460}whore. ["Whoremongers and adulterers God will judge"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Heb. 13:4).

Contemporary America reminds one of the grade school student who answered the question "What was David's sin" with: "His only sin was a slight tendency towards adultery." In the last days, the "eyes are filled with adultery" (2 Pet. 2:14), and the "one worlders" are steeped in adultery (James 4:4). The whole adulterous mess (Rev. 2:20--23) goes into the Tribulation with the Queen of adulteresses---the Roman Catholic Church (Matt. 13:33; Rev. 17:1--5).

THE EIGHTH COMMANDMENT

["Thou shalt not steal"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 15).

More negativism! Isn't it strange how people like to go by "the Ten Commandments" while they are complaining about "negative preaching" and a "negative outlook on life"? What could be more NEGATIVE than the Ten Commandments?

"Thou shalt not steal."

Thou shalt not steal anyone's [good name]{.class_s4N4-0} by slandering him (Prov. 16:27--30).

Thou shalt not steal the [bloom of purity]{.class_s4N4-0} from the cheeks of a young woman by sacrificing her virtue on the altar of your own lusts (Deut. 22:13--29).

Thou shalt not steal [years ]{.class_s4N4-0}off the life of thy mother or father by worrying them to death with the way that thou livest (Deut. 21:18).

Thou shalt not steal money from the Highway Department for thine town so thy people will make thee a City Commissioner.

Thou shalt not steal watermelons, apples, cherries, or grapes from a neighbor's field and laugh it off as a "childhood prank."

Thou shalt not steal away from thy job fifteen minutes before the whistle bloweth and then collect pay for a full eight hours' work.

Thou shalt not steal away to the water cooler (or the coffee pot) to "shoot the bull" and then pretend that thou hast been working the whole time!

(You see, believing the English sheds a lot more light on the text than looking up a few words in a Hebrew or Greek lexicon.)

Clarke grasps the spirit of the commandment much better than Dr. Johnson ([Wycliffe Commentary]{.class_s4N4-0}), who simply reproduces the ancient myth that the commandment is a reference to the "rights of private property" being respected. (That is like saying that the first commandment refers to "going to church on Sunday.")

THE NINTH COMMANDMENT

["Thou shalt not bear false witness against thy neighbour"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 16).

This is the ninth commandment; like the others, it is [negative]{.class_s4N4-0}.

Rome, Egypt, and Athens all had strong laws regarding "perjury" under oath ([Records of the Past,]{.class_s4N4-0} Vol. 8, pg. 65), but the Lord's revelation at Sinai naturally goes far beyond these ancient practices. [Lying ]{.class_s4N4-0}and [slander ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Prov. 10:18), [flattering ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Prov. 7:21), [suppressing ]{.class_s4N4-0}the truth (Rom. 1:20--26), refusing to preach the truth (Matt. 23:1--33), [exaggerating ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Acts 24:1--9), giving [false information ]{.class_s4N4-0}(1 Kings 13:18), backing out on []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_462}your word (Jer. 37:21--38:6), refusing to fulfill oaths and vows (Eccl. 5:1--6), lying under oath (1 Kings 22:15--16, 22) and false accusations against anyone (Jude 9, 15) are all included in the commandment.

The greatest bearers of false witness are not the culprits who lie under oath in the circuit or probate court; the greatest bearers of false witness in the Nineteenth Century were the teachers and preachers (2 Pet. 2:1) who assimilated and passed on (through the news media) the material written by Immanuel Kant, George Hegel, Socrates, Plato, Aristotle, Henri Bergson, Charles Lyell, Thomas Huxley, Charles Darwin, Ernst Haeckel, Karl Marx, Nicolai Lenin, Leon Trotsky, Adam Weishaupt, Bertrand Russell, John Dewey, the Fabian Society, Giovani Gentile, and William James (see extended comments on Prov. 21:30, 14:5, and 11:21 in the[ Commentary on Proverbs]{.class_s4N4-0}).

No one has to be taught how to [lie ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Psa. 58:3). One must be taught how to tell [the truth. ]{.class_s4N4-0}Lying is as natural for any man, anywhere, as drinking water. Abraham lies (Gen. 12:18), David lies (1 Sam. 21:13), Saul lies (1 Sam. 15:21), Job lies (Job 12:6), Daniel allows a lie (Dan. 2:46), Joseph lies (Gen. 44:2), Peter lies (Matt. 26:69--74), and if you had a dollar for every lie that Abraham Lincoln and George Washington told you could buy their monuments.

A man who sells a garment that is 90% wool and 10% dacron, and advertises it as "all wool," is a liar. A man who advertises a transmission job for \$50.00 and then the "extras" come to \$75.00 is a liar. A woman who says "yes" when she means ["no"]{.class_s4N4-0} is a liar (Matt. 5:37), and a man who says "maybe" when he means ["yes"]{.class_s4N4-0} is a liar. A man who says, "with the concurrence of conflicting []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_463}ideologies and the integrating of racial mores and ethics, it seems highly suitable that a holistic approach of interrelating values be adapted to the curriculum, so that a more meaningful relevance can be attained by the pupil in regards to the cultural exchanges which now prevail in the more progressive ethnic dialogue," when he means "TEACH CHILDREN TO FORNICATE WITH THE OPPOSITE RACE," [is a liar.]{.class_s4N4-0}

Furthermore, education and vocabulary do not change the nature or the work of the liar, nor do degrees or "personality." A liar is a [liar, ]{.class_s4N4-0}and there is no need to cover up the God-defying sin with a lexicographer's blanket and pretend that the man is saying something he is NOT saying.

It is fashionable and "intellectual" these days to pretend that modern educators are saying [what they are saying,]{.class_s4N4-0} but none of them are. They are saying [something else]{.class_s4N4-0} and covering it up so it looks like something you want to believe (see comments on Prov. 6:19, 14:5, and 19:5 in the[ Commentary on Proverbs]{.class_s4N4-0}). It has always been fashionable and "intellectual" to lie, and some of the greatest liars who ever lived---Shaw, Huxley, Darwin, Van Doren, Hegel, the SDS, the SDA, SIECUS, and Dewey---clothed their lying with an eruditeness and a "coolness" which would impress any other liar. You see, you can't "con" a man unless he is CROOKED.

When [Time ]{.class_s4N4-0}or [Newsweek ]{.class_s4N4-0}magazines---two of the great modern liars in the Twentieth Century---say, "The southern city of\...peacefully integrated more than ten years ago, and today, it shows the marks of how racial and social problems may be solved as a community moves progressively forward to new understandings. Of course, there are many problems yet to be worked out, but []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_464}vast progress has been made, and further improvements can be seen in the near future as citizens and government work together to bring in a totally integrated community," do you know what is going on? Can't you guess?

1\. Five fistfights [per day]{.class_s4N4-0} in all schools above grammar school.

2\. No more social activities in any of the high schools.

3\. Two stabbings [per day]{.class_s4N4-0} in racial conflicts.

4\. Intense hatred [mounting steadily]{.class_s4N4-0} between Blacks and Whites.

5\. Teachers quitting their jobs when they cannot get [police protection.]{.class_s4N4-0}

6\. Doors locked and guns loaded in every house in town that can afford it.

7\. Negroes getting fired from jobs right and left, [and then being reinstalled by the federal government]{.class_s4N4-0} under threats of bankruptcy or imprisonment or both.

8\. VD and illegitimate children increasing at a rate of 200%.

9\. The standards of education dropping by the week until "social promotions" are given to children making less than forty on their grades. This is done so that the flunkies will "[graduate ]{.class_s4N4-0}from high school" and thereby be eligible for jobs, as they have ["qualified"]{.class_s4N4-0}!

But is that the picture you've been getting from [Time, Newsweek, Ebony, Life, Look,]{.class_s4N4-0} and [Reader's Digest]{.class_s4N4-0}? Not hardly.

"Thou shalt not bear false witness."

The greatest bearers of false witness since 1930 (barring the Bible revisers and commentators!) have []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_465}been the magazines, newspapers, radio, and TV of the United States of America; Reuters, Peking, Tass, [Pravda]{.class_s4N4-0}, Hanoi, and even Goebbels, could never hold a candle to them. The Associated Press, the United Press, and the International News Service have been devoted for more than forty years to CREATING news situations; and this has been done by emphasizing the obscene, the sensational, the "off color," the left wing, the erotic, the psychotic, the abnormal, the eccentric, and the impractical. A worldwide illustration was given of the results of this crusade in 1972 at the Democratic Convention. There it was paraded before the eyes of the world how the poor, deluded politicians in America had actually BELIEVED what they read in the magazines and newspapers for so long that they were convinced that the majority of the people in America were queers and freaks. The "credibility gap" between what the [Press had been promoting and what Americans had been thinking]{.class_s4N4-0} was so great that the unfortunate candidate couldn't get five states out of fifty to vote for him. Talk about a "generation gap"! The gap between what the news media [promotes and what is going]{.class_s4N4-0} on is so great that no man in his right mind would trust the 10 o'clock news for any truthful information---not even the weather.

One might say that the contemporary American dilemma was [created ]{.class_s4N4-0}by the news media, who also nursed, nourished, cultivated, and promoted it. Goldwater, Wallace, and Agnew (1968--1972) were very mild in their descriptions of this "baby." The news media naturally defended their means of income by attacking all three men and overwhelming the opposition with "hate literature" that was as good as anything Gerald Winrod or Smith ever put out, but since no man can []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_466}now defend himself from these attacks, unless he owns a radio or TV station (and then they will put him off the air \[see Carl McIntire, 1970\]), the news media are still "in control." They will encourage revolution until the revolutionists seize control over them, and after that, they will print only "the party line." [You never overthrow a Communist revolution with a Communist revolution,]{.class_s4N4-0} for all Communist revolutionists are put to death as soon as the first Communist revolution succeeds in revolting. "The Iron Guard" of Russia (1930--1950) found this out the hard way, and so did the friends of Fidel Castro.

You will be amazed to see how "conservative" the AP, the UP, and the INS will get when their stockholders, publishers, and editors have all been threatened with jail by the same group which they promoted for four decades! You have never seen a real "pig" (expression for policemen, 1965--1975) until you have seen the [Illuminati ]{.class_s4N4-0}and the [Commintern]{.class_s4N4-0}.

["Thou shalt not bear false witness"]{.class_s4N2-0} has been omitted from Romans 13:9 in the [ASV ]{.class_s4N4-0}(1960). I wonder why?

THE TENTH COMMANDMENT

["Thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's house\...nor anything that is thy neighbour's"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 17).

This is the strongest commandment given since the first one. It is one of the commandments which Jesus refused to quote in dealing with the rich young ruler (Luke 18:20), and it is the commandment that "tied the rag on the bush" as far as that young man was concerned (Luke 18:22). Paul says that he would not have known the nature of lust without this commandment []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_467}(Rom. 7:7), but when this commandment became clear to his understanding (Rom. 7:8--10), he realized the nature of sin, and he ["died"]{.class_s4N2-0} on the spot (Rom. 7:9). ["Covetousness\...is idolatry"]{.class_s4N2-0}[ ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Col. 3:5).

["Thou shalt not covet"]{.class_s4N2-0} goes far beyond the preceding eight commandments, for this commandment is dealing with an inward desire which only God can see, at times (1 Sam 16:7). Covetousness is apparent many times---as in the case of women fighting for garments at a "sale"---but many times it is carefully concealed (see Judas, John 12:6). It was covetousness that caused the original rebellion (Isa. 14:13--14). It was covetousness that caused the fall of the human race (Gen. 3:1--6). It was covetousness that turned the ecumenical council of A.D. 33 into a Mafia (John 11:53), and it was covetousness that finished off [Gehazi ]{.class_s4N4-0}(2 Kings 5:20--27) and [Simon ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Acts 8:18--20). Covetousness is kin to [pride ]{.class_s4N4-0}because few men attempt to take that which they covet until they feel that they are "big enough" to get away with it.

Achan ["saw"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["coveted"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["took"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["hid"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Josh. 7:21). The one who "searches the hearts" and "tries the hearts" (Psa. 139:23; Jer 17:10) searched out Achan throughout all the tribes of Israel (Josh. 7:16). The other sin that is associated with covetousness is ENVY, and the careful reader of Genesis 4:2--6; Mark 15:10; Acts 13:45; and Isaiah 14:13--14 will observe that covetousness [produces ]{.class_s4N4-0}envy. Only where pride is present can one desire things for SELF.

[Pride. covetousness. envy. ]{.class_s4N4-0}From these sins---(the "Big Three")---come lying, swearing, cheating, hating, killing, and blasphemy. All the sins in the catalog of 2 Timothy 3:1--7 begin with ["lovers of their own selves."]{.class_s4N2-0} []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_468}That is, if the first commandment is kept, the tenth commandment is kept; if either is broken, the other is broken. Where God occupies the thoughts and affections of the mind and heart, there is contentment (Phil. 4:4--7). The man who keeps his thoughts stayed on God (Isa. 26:3) can truthfully say: ["The ]{.class_s4N2-0}[Lord ]{.class_s4N9-0}[is my shepherd; I shall not want"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Psa. 23:1). Where "self" fills the heart, mind, and soul, there is always an unfilled "want" or "need." One whole book in the Bible is devoted to this truth; it is a book written by the wisest man who ever lived. Its closing words are: ["For God shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Eccl. 12:14). Covetousness is a secret sin, and the overt acts which follow it only prove that it was conceived and incubated in darkness, long before it hatched and stepped out into the world.

So strongly does the word of God point out this sin that Paul writes: ["The love of money is the root of all evil"]{.class_s4N2-0} (1 Tim. 6:10). The attempts of Dr. Green, the [ASV ]{.class_s4N4-0}(1901), and the [NASV]{.class_s4N4-0} (1963) to "water down" this text only emphasize the gravity of their sin.

Commercial advertising in the Twentieth Century majors in increasing sinners, and the line between "supplying a need" and "creating a buyer" has long ago been passed (see comments in the [Commentary on Proverbs,]{.class_s4N4-0} Prov. 12:12, 1972). Modern television is simply a 24-hour-a-day machine designed to create covetousness where it does not already exist. The whole point and purpose of TV, from morning to night, is to make the viewer feel that he NEEDS something or MUST HAVE something which he does not have. This may vary from desiring a show girl for a wife (instead of his []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_469}own wife) to desiring a new power mower, but there is no doubt about the operation as a whole. Commercial advertising creates lawbreakers.

The rage and frustration of the unregenerate Black is cultivated from morning to night by the presentation of wealth, sexy white women, and liquor. The misery and depression of the average housewife is increased constantly by the presentation of soap suds, vacuum cleaners, detergents, dishwashers, and automatic appliances that do everything but compose classical music. Modern Americans are made to feel as though they are paupers when most of them live better than 90% of the people in other countries.

Every possible enticement is used to make young people feel frustrated and "held down," and every allurement to the flesh known to man is used to get men and women to fornicate or commit adultery. Nor is this "over-painting" the picture. Bare-legged, sensual, scintillating, hip-twisting, belly-shaking young women are not a rarity on ANY evening program; and the casual "drink" is offered somewhere (to someone) on nearly every daily "soap opera" from nine in the morning till five in the afternoon. The marriage bed is paraded as public property on scores of "late, late" movies, and the moral standards of TV are plainly the moral standards of Hollywood. The whole thing, from sunup to sundown (and everywhere between), is gauged to make you desire something you do not have; and whether this be new piston rings, razor blades, antifreeze, bath towels, frisbees, stereo sets, Christmas tree lights, dog food, Mustangs, perfume, chewing gum, deodorant, or "living bras," it is the same refrain---["thou shalt not covet\...any thing that is thy neighbour's."]{.class_s4N2-0}

[What do you suppose is covered by the words ]{.class_s4N4-0}["ANY THING"]{.class_s4N2-0}? One is reminded of Bud Robinson who prayed this prayer after returning to his hotel room following an all-day tour of New York: "Dear Lord, I jest wanna thank you that ah didn't see anything today that ah wanted!"

What do you suppose Paul would think about "modern Christianity" after writing 1 Timothy 6:8? The average "consecrated Christian" in America already feels that he "must have" air conditioning in his home, air conditioning in his car, a TV set, an electric stove, city water, city electricity, a deep freeze, and a car---and in some cases a boat or a plane! What do you suppose will happen when Christians in America are reduced to the text of 1 Timothy 6:8? They were reduced to this in China and Russia in the last forty years!

With this last commandment, the "Ten" end. These commandments are called "[the Ten Words]{.class_s4N4-0}" in Hebrew or "the Law" or "the Testimony" or "the Covenant" or "the Commandments." They are given AFTER salvation (chap. 12) and before any ritual observances, although one of them is a ritual delivered to Israel. They were authoritatively delivered so that man might be made aware of the compass of his obligations, that the authority of man's conscience might be strengthened, and that an absolute standard might be revealed by which other moral standards are to be judged. This Law is ["spiritual"]{.class_s4N2-0}[ ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Rom. 7:14) and ["good" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(Rom. 7:12), and among other things, it was given to show Israel their true condition (Rom. 2:28--29).

The heathen have knowledge of this Law instinctively (Rom. 2:14), and this is apparent by any set of tribal customs and laws among any race of people anywhere on the earth, in any age. The heathen know ["thou shalt []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_471}not commit adultery"]{.class_s4N2-0} (see Gen. 20:3--4) better than the average College professor knows it; and the heathen know the first commandment (Jer. 40:2--5) a good bit better than Albert Einstein, Oswald Spengler, Edward Bulwer, H. G. Wells, or any College-educated football player ever knew it. ["Thou shalt not steal"]{.class_s4N2-0} was known to every tribe of Indians in America before Christopher Columbus ever showed up. Those who try to hide behind the innocence of the "heathen" (Rom. 2:14--16) will discover in the day of judgment that they hid behind something that wasn't there (Rom. 2:1--3).

[You ]{.class_s4N4-0}know the Law [and you don't keep it. ]{.class_s4N4-0}Your father broke it, your grandfather broke it, you break it, and your children break it. You are a [Lawbreaker]{.class_s4N4-0} and a [transgressor ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Rom. 3:9--23), and all of your relatives were and are. Unless you find someone to bear your transgressions (Isa. 53:6--12), you will certainly be condemned by the One who established the laws of nature, conduct, sowing, retribution, and holiness (John 5:27). ["Christ hath redeemed us from the curse of the law, being made a curse for us"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Gal. 3:13). It is not the man who is [ignorant of the Law]{.class_s4N4-0} who is cursed (see John 7:49), but the man to whom the Law has been revealed (Rom. 7:9--10). Whether this revelation comes from the thunder and lightning of Sinai, afire with the glory of God's holiness, or whether it comes from the still small voice of the seared conscience (Tit. 1:15), it is the same Law.

You and I are [Lawbreakers]{.class_s4N4-0}. If you don't have a "guilt complex" about that, you need to get one as soon as possible, and if you have never coveted a "guilt complex," may I highly recommend it to you as a safeguard against self-righteousness and a false sense of security.

20:18 "And all the people saw the thunderings, and the lightnings, and the noise of the trumpet, and the mountain smoking: and when the people saw it, they removed, and stood afar off.

19 And they said unto Moses, Speak thou with us, and we will hear: but let not God speak with us, lest we die.

20 And Moses said unto the people, Fear not: for God is come to prove you, and that his fear may be before your faces, that ye sin not.

21 And the people stood afar off, and Moses drew near unto the thick darkness where God was."

(The Masoretic text has vs. 15 where vs. 18 is found in the [King James]{.class_s4N4-0} text. This has been done by putting the sixth, seventh, eighth, and ninth commandments all under vs. 13.)

From verse 19, it would appear that the entire nation of Israel heard the Ten Commandments when they were originally given. Moses returns with no "tables of stone" until 32:15--16. Here the people get the word directly; it is accompanied by lightnings, thunder, and smoke (vs. 18).

["And when the people saw it, they removed, and stood afar off"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 18). Their actions match those of the publican who felt deeply convicted of his sins (Luke 18:13). They do not feel worthy even to stand at the base of the mount, so they back off as the commandments are given.

To appreciate the scene, you would have to imagine yourself standing there, fresh from Egyptian idolatry and recently "blooded" in combat, and then hearing a voice higher than Mt. Sinai (vs. 22) roaring out: ["Thou shalt have no other gods before me!"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["Thou shalt []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_473}not kill!"]{.class_s4N2-0} One can only imagine what some of them felt like who had been necking with their neighbor's wives and stealing water cans, when they heard, ["Thou shalt not commit adultery!"]{.class_s4N2-0} and ["Thou shalt not steal!"]{.class_s4N2-0} It is one thing to hear these words preached from a pulpit by a sinner, and it is another thing to have them come out of the blue sky (2 Pet. 1:17--18) accompanied by fire, smoke, lightning, and thunder! Don't you know there were a lot of "guilt complexes" that day?

["And they said unto Moses\...let not God speak with us, lest we die"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 19). This speech was proper, according to verse 20; and it shows that a "guilt complex" is sane, realistic, and proper if guilt is there. Freud's system (and those systems that followed his teaching) consisted in applying Darwin's theory to MORALS. To be brief about it, even though we may risk some attacks by those who are always hung up on "over-simplification," Freud's psychoanalysis consisted primarily of convincing the patient [that he had done nothing wrong. ]{.class_s4N4-0}The \$50.00-an-hour sessions on the couch (1900--1970) are designed (essentially) to convince the patient that what he is worrying about is only a [normal stage]{.class_s4N4-0} or [process ]{.class_s4N4-0}through which everyone passes. Where the patient accepts this explanation, the trouble "clears up," and he becomes "normal." Where he does not, the patient is considered to be "abnormal" because most people don't work themselves into a dither over the particular problem the patient has. Modern psychiatry, as modern education, carefully avoids any absolute truths or moral standards; everything is "values," "adjustments," "situation ethics," "meaningful correlations," and "relative concepts."

At the present writing (1995), the Federal school system---formerly called "[public ]{.class_s4N4-0}school system"---is []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_474}teaching that even ABNORMALITIES are nothing to be ashamed of or corrected [unless they are abnormalities of a RELIGIOUS or PATRIOTIC nature. ]{.class_s4N4-0}The young man who distributes Gospel tracts in the high school is "extremely abnormal" and is in desperate need of "therapy." But the homosexuals who burn the white students with cigarette butts in the washrooms are "[maladjusted ]{.class_s4N4-0}minorities" who must be given "consideration and understanding." The student who carries a Bible and sports a crew haircut is a "fanatic" or an "extremist." On the other hand, the Black Muslim who clenches his fist at the flag is only showing signs of "a sincere desire to better the establishment by a reevaluation of goals." Any system which abandons the moral standards of chapter 20 will wind up in adopting the moral standards of Hollywood and the [jungle]{.class_s4N4-0}. There is no such thing as "neutral ground" when dealing with sin: ["All unrighteousness is sin"]{.class_s4N2-0} (1 John 5:17).

The people want an intermediary because they recognize what Job (Job 9:33) and Peter (Luke 5:8) recognized: they were too defiled to have fellowship with a holy God (Isa. 6:1--7). In this respect, the liberated slaves of 1500 B.C. were so far in advance of the contemporary American educators and scientists that there is no proper comparison whatsoever (see comments under 19:12--13). Not one Israelite in the camp made the mistake that C.I. Scofield made in his note on page 607 ([Old]{.class_s4N4-0} [Scofield Reference Bible]{.class_s4N4-0}), or the mistake that all of the commentators made when they altered the word ["fear"]{.class_s4N2-0} to "awe" (see the lengthy treatment under Prov. 1:7 in the [Commentary on Proverbs]{.class_s4N4-0}). The Israelites are scared stiff, and they have good reason to be (32:10).

["And Moses said\...Fear not\...that his fear may be before your faces, that ye sin not"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 20). God is scaring you so you won't be afraid. That is exactly what the "original" says. It is like John writing ["perfect love casteth out fear"]{.class_s4N2-0} (1 John 4:18), and Paul adding ["work out your own salvation with fear and trembling"]{.class_s4N2-0} (Phil. 2:12). Nor is "reverential awe" any exposition of any passage where the word occurs (see Psa. 33:18, 34:7, 103:11, 103:17, 115:13; Isa. 50:10; Jer. 26:19; Mal. 3:16; Exod. 9:30, etc.).

The ["fear" ]{.class_s4N2-0}of the passage is being "flat scared" (as they say down South), and where no SCARE is present, nobody is afraid of anything. When Paul says ["knowing therefore the terror of the Lord"]{.class_s4N2-0} (2 Cor. 5:11), he is not talking about any kind of "reverence" or any "reverend" ever "revered." (The Greek [phobos ]{.class_s4N4-0}is the famous "phobia" used in claustrophobia, triskaidekaphobia, phobaphobia, etc.).

The commandments and God's presence are both here to put fear into man, and this is exactly the attitude taken by the Lord Jesus Christ in the New Testament (Luke 12:5). There is no problem in any passage in the [AV ]{.class_s4N4-0}(1611); the problem is in the "approach" of the modern Conservative when dealing with NEGATIVE truths. The average Conservative today is [Liberal ]{.class_s4N4-0}in his [approach ]{.class_s4N4-0}to presenting the truths of the Bible. [w]{.class_s4NB}here negative truth is to be preached (Acts 20:27 and comments in the [Commentary on Acts]{.class_s4N4-0}), he does not dare give it [clearly]{.class_s4N4-0}, for his backbone and manhood left him when he abandoned the authority of the [Authorized ]{.class_s4N4-0}text:[ ]{.class_s4N4-0}he has no authority.

Now when a man is called upon to deliver a negative message (1 Kings 13:1--5) that will affect his []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_476 .class-1}[income ]{.class_s4N4-0}(1 Kings 22:13--14) or his [life ]{.class_s4N4-0}(Acts 7:53--59), he simply cannot do it without an authority to back him. Conservatives in America have abandoned the only real authority God gave them, so from that time to this, the majority of them present truth in the same glowing positive terms that Liberals have used since Genesis chapter 3. Furthermore, the first thing that the faculty members of Conservative schools do to the young ministerial student when he comes to them to learn the Bible is [REMOVE its authority]{.class_s4N4-0} and replace it with the authority of "Conservative scholarship."

Richard Wurmbrand has wisely said that in Communist Bulgaria and Romania, anyone was allowed to say that God is [good;]{.class_s4N4-0} what you could not say is that the Devil is [bad. ]{.class_s4N4-0}This explains why the word [fear,]{.class_s4N4-0} meaning ["fear,"]{.class_s4N4-0} has been taken out of the Christian's vocabulary. His teachers and preachers have turned Liberal without abandoning their profession of faith in the "fundamentals." Their "about face" was done to maintain professional standing, social image, and, above all (!), [a large income. ]{.class_s4N4-0}They will not preach a negative truth clearly. Since all Liberals and "Modernists" and psychiatrists deride "fear" and call it an "unhealthy emotion," the modern Conservative bows the knee to Baal and refuses to preach the clear statements of Hebrew 11:7 and Jude 23 and the text before us. The man who is not "Hell-scared" will be "Hell-scorched" eventually. If all you fear is old age, cancer, war, revolution, the Communists, the Illuminati, the Catholics, your "inlaws," your "work for the glory of God," lack of money, bad health, ridicule, your "testimony," unemployment, pollution, taxes, accidents, and death, you are a Bible-rejecting infidel;[ your New Birth had no affect on your []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_477}infidelity whatsoever. ]{.class_s4N4-0}A lot of Christians these days are Bible-rejecting infidels (see [Manuscript Evidence]{.class_s4N4-0}).

God put fear into the hearts of men (vs. 20) [so they wouldn't sin. ]{.class_s4N4-0}When they cease from sin, they cease from FEAR (vs. 20) That is, the only solution for FEAR is obeying the commandments. [Education ]{.class_s4N4-0}will never get rid of it; [science ]{.class_s4N4-0}will never get rid of it; and even where [psychiatry ]{.class_s4N4-0}is able to alleviate it or cover it up, it still persists. "Freedom from fear" is only solved in Hebrews chapter 2 and Romans chapter 10. All other "liberations" promised by science, religion, and education, and the United Nations bear the stamp of a convicted sinner running from the truth and trying to ignore the reality of guilt and sin. You don't get rid of a dead rat by covering it with a newspaper.

["And Moses drew near unto the thick darkness where God was"]{.class_s4N2-0} (vs. 21). The verse is hinted at in 1 Kings 8:12, but in both of the passages the darkness is merely a cover for human eyes so that they will not perish upon seeing that ["light which no man can approach unto" ]{.class_s4N2-0}(1 Tim. 6:16). ["God is light"]{.class_s4N2-0} (1 John 1:5--8), but those words describe His nature in its essence. As far as the world is concerned (John 1:1--8), God lies in impenetrable darkness; the atheist simply takes the word of his senses to be reliable.

20:22 "And the LORD said unto Moses, Thus thou shalt say unto the children of Israel, Ye have seen that I have talked with you from heaven.

23 Ye shall not make with me gods of silver, neither shall ye make unto you gods of gold.

24 An altar of earth thou shalt make unto me, and shalt sacrifice thereon thy burnt offerings, and thy []{#c2DW.xhtml_page_478}peace offerings, thy sheep, and thine oxen: in all places where I record my name I will come unto thee, and I will bless thee.

25 And if thou wilt make me an altar of stone, thou shalt not build it of hewn stone: for if thou lift up thy tool upon it, thou has polluted it.

26 Neither shalt thou go up by steps unto mine altar, that thy nakedness be not discovered thereon."

Moses goes up again for the fourth time (vs. 21), and now he receives a revelation that runs for more than three chapters. The instructions for the Tabernacle only occur after three chapters have been given on individual and national conduct towards God and man.

The first instruction deals with proper methods of worship BEFORE any tabernacle was erected.
